news.title: Samsung Taylor fab reportedly targets HPC, automotive chips; clients reach 121
news.description: Samsung Electronics plans to focus its new foundry plant in Taylor, Texas, on high-performance computing (HPC) and automotive semiconductors as it expands its customer base and prepares the facility for production, according to Korean media reports.
